content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weak with Nifty -1.12%, IT in freefall (-4.79%), VIX +3.44% to 19.23 signaling rising fear. FMCG defensive rotation playing out (Nestle/HUL strong into earnings) but IT/PSU bank weakness drags indices. Book already 67% deployed with net negative unrealized P&L — deployment hysteresis kicks in, default disposition is NO new entries, focus on managing existing book.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position down -5.8% but thesis intact: Q4 beat (PAT +35% YoY), HDFC Sec target Rs 90, PSU bank momentum. Current SL 75.00 is above VWAP 76.55 and near intraday low 75.75 — risk of being whipsawed out. Tighten-only rule forbids loosening SL; since current SL (75.00) is below, I'll leave SL at 75.00 effectively... Actually 74.50 would be LOOSENING — REJECTED. Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact (Q4 beat, HDFC Sec target Rs 90), but entry at post-rally high (81.50) now giving back. SL 75.00 is ~1% below CMP — tight risk. Cannot loosen SL. Holding and letting SL do its job; if it triggers, loss is contained."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1011.65,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY — skipping. Converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.8% gain, SL 1011.65 already at/just above entry (984) locking in gains. Thesis strong: Q4 beat, ICICI Sec target 1350, 36% disbursement growth. Current SL is ~1% below CMP 1024.50 — already tight. Let it run toward 1100 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.1% minor drawdown. Gold hedge thesis intact with VIX rising and geopolitical risks. SL 119.00 gives adequate room (~4% below CMP), target 135 still achievable. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1395.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position barely breakeven (+0.1%). Current SL is at entry (1412.94) which is ABOVE CMP 1411.20 — SL is effectively already triggered/imminent. Since CMP is below SL, loosening to 1395 is the only way to keep position alive. But tighten-only rule prohibits this. Skip MODIFY — convert to HOLD and let SL fire if it triggers."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock at 1411, SL at 1412.94 — already within a tick of stop. FMCG strong but stock near 52w high and brokers mostly at Hold (targets 1400-1500). If SL triggers, exit with minimal loss; that's acceptable. Cannot loosen SL per rules."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, Q4 results Apr 27 (3 days) — binary event but strong pre-announced business update (+25% advances, +19.6% CASA) and universal bank optionality. SL 1035 (~1.4% below CMP) is tight. Hold into earnings; position sized appropriately to absorb adverse gap."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 681.00,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "+0.7% gain, trailing SL from 678 to 681 (breakeven). Stock at/near 52w high, Q4 results Apr 29 (binary event), CMP above analyst target band upper end (687). Lock in breakeven to eliminate downside risk on an extended name going into earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.4% drawdown, down 2.72% today as FMCG rally fades. SL 2260 provides ~2% cushion; Q4 results Apr 30 key catalyst. Thesis (rural recovery, Nestle read-through) intact. Holding with defined risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%, SL 393 (~1.9% below CMP) adequate. Peak summer demand catalyst intact, Q4 results May 15. Energy sector resilient. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 75.00 already tight at ~1% below CMP. Cannot loosen. Let market decide."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry (1011.65 vs 984) locking in gains. Let it run to 1100 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, minor drawdown, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry 1412.94 is essentially at CMP — will auto-exit on any further weakness. Near-zero risk of larger loss."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 27 catalyst. SL 1035 tight and appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 681.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to entry (breakeven) ahead of Apr 29 earnings — eliminate downside on a stretched name at 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2260 gives ~2% room. Q4 on Apr 30."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Minor drawdown, SL adequate, summer demand catalyst."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HSCL, PPLPHARMA, EMCURE, ABSLAMC, CLEAN all show interesting volume/price action but on a cautious day with book already 67% deployed and -0.24% unrealized, default is NO new entries. Re-evaluate tomorrow if market firms. RBLBANK showing strength but Q4 on Apr 28 — too close to event for a fresh entry without clarity.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 67% deployed with 8 CNC positions, net -0.24% unrealized. Deployment hysteresis in effect — NO new entries this tick. Focus is pure book management. Notable concentration risk: 3 positions (MAHABANK, PNBHOUSING, AUBANK) are all rate-sensitive financials — ~25% of capital in financials cluster, approaching the 20% cluster threshold. Will not add more to this cluster. Two binary events approaching: AUBANK Q4 Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR/NESTLE late-April. Granules SL now trailed to breakeven pre-earnings. VIX rising and IT carnage suggests defensive posture — cash cushion at 33% is appropriate given volatility."
}
